name: CSV Source
description: Fetch a delimited file from object storage (storage connector) and emit parsed JSON records.

env.CONNECTOR_CONFIG: Storage connector JSON (required: bucket; optional: endpoint, accessKeyId, secretAccessKey)
env.DEPLOYMENT_CONFIG: Step/pipeline deployment overrides (required after merge: region)
env.EXECUTION_CONFIG: Step overrides (required: objectKey; optional: delimiter, hasHeader)
env.PIPELET_DEFAULTS: Optional JSON with deploymentConfiguration / executionConfiguration defaults
